title: senecio rosinae
intro: Senecio rosinae, also known as the Woolly Senecio, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio rosinae include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and improve overall well-being. Senecio rosinae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote healing.
